title: CULTIVATE Trade Show
address: 400 N High St, Columbus, OH 43215, United States
description: AmericanHort hosts Cultivate—the premier event for the entire green industry—at the Greater Columbus Convention Center. The trade show floor is open July 12–14, 2026, with thousands of growers, retailers, suppliers, and horticulture professionals from across North America and beyond.

title: Garden Center Conference & Expo
address: 2100 West End Avenue, Nashville, TN 37203, United States
description: The Garden Center Conference & Expo is the educational conference and immersive expo for owners, executives, and managers of independent garden centers across North America. Produced by Garden Center magazine / GIE Media, the 2026 edition features education, networking, and an Immersive Garden Center at the Loews Vanderbilt Hotel in Nashville.

title: Canadian Greenhouse Conference
address: 6815 Stanley Avenue, Niagara Falls, Ontario L2G 3Y9, Canada
description: The Canadian Greenhouse Conference is Canada’s foremost event for commercial growers of crops produced in a controlled environment. The two-day conference and trade show attracts growers from across North America and showcases production techniques, research, products, and technology.

title: Green Industry Trade Show
address: 4847A - 19 Street, Red Deer, AB T4R 2N7, Canada
description: The Green Industry Show & Conference in Red Deer attracts more than 1,200 visitors and over 100 exhibitors from across the landscape industry. Attendees get keynotes, educational sessions, and a full trade show at Westerner Park.

title: Québec Vert Trade Show
address: 2670 avenue Beauparlant, Saint-Hyacinthe, QC J2S 4M8, Canada
description: Québec Vert’s commercial expo brings together ornamental horticulture, environmental horticulture, and urban agriculture professionals from across Quebec. The show at l’Espace Saint-Hyacinthe is a key connection point for growers, retailers, and suppliers in the province.

title: HortEast Trade Show
address: 377 Killam Drive, Moncton, NB E1C 3T1, Canada
description: HortEast is Atlantic Canada’s top horticultural conference and trade show. Industry professionals from landscape, greenhouse, nursery, municipalities, garden centers, lawn care, turf, and golf gather each year at the Moncton Coliseum.

title: Gulf States Horticultural Expo
venue: Arthur R. Outlaw Mobile Convention Center
address: 1 South Water Street, Mobile, AL 36602, United States
description: The Gulf States Horticultural Expo (GSHE) is the premier winter green-industry trade show of the South. Produced with ALNLA, MSNLA, and LNLA, it brings wholesale growers, landscapers, retailers, manufacturers, and distributors together in Mobile for commerce, networking, and education.

title: MANTS Trade Show
address: One West Pratt Street, Baltimore, MD 21201, United States
description: MANTS—The Masterpiece of Trade Shows—is the mid-Atlantic green industry’s January gathering at the Baltimore Convention Center. Nursery, landscape, and garden-center professionals meet here every year because MANTS means business.

title: CULTIVATE Trade Show
address: 400 N High St, Columbus, OH 43215, United States
description: AmericanHort returns to Columbus for Cultivate 2027 at the Greater Columbus Convention Center (July 10–13, 2027). Jolly Farmer will again exhibit in booth 2216.
